__comment__: tau2/telecom task-family specs (ESSA-style, ADAPTED for tool-calling over a diagnostic decision-tree). Scope: the 3 families exercised by data/tau2/domains/telecom/tasks_small.json (20 tasks). Golden traces follow data/tau2/domains/telecom/tech_support_workflow_solo.md. Families: 'mobile_data' (Path 2 = 2.1 Unavailable + 2.2 Slow, 8 tasks), 'no_service' (Path 1 No Service/Connection, 6 tasks), 'mms' (Path 3 Picture/Group Messaging, 6 tasks). The task-id prefix maps to a family via schema_agent._FAMILY_BY_PREFIX: mobile_data_issue->mobile_data, service_issue->no_service, mms_issue->mms.

__design_notes__.deviation_from_alfworld_essa: alfworld task_specs use a STATIC linear base_subtask_sequence. telecom is a branching DIAGNOSTIC TREE, so we keep a single ordered subtask list but gate every subtask with a `when` predicate over task_state. Diagnostic subtasks fill task_state; fix subtasks fire only when their branch condition holds; once task_state.resolved becomes true every later `when` is false and the walk short-circuits. The walk is guarded+sticky (a subtask stays active until its done_when_all holds) and the executor is restricted to the active subtask's tools. This encodes the tree WITHOUT a big-model scheduler (the deferred DyLight piece).
__design_notes__.no_pddl_world_model: tool returns are already structured, so the StateUpdater writes parsed values DIRECTLY into the shared task_state fields. No separate world model.
__design_notes__.routing_field_data_available: Path 2 splits on whether mobile data is up at all. The StateUpdater sets a derived boolean `data_available` next to `speed_test`: 'no connection' -> data_available=false (run Path 2.1 fixes); any real speed -> data_available=true (data is up; if not 'excellent', run Path 2.2 slow-data fixes). 'excellent' also sets resolved=true. This keeps every branch guard a simple `== ` / `!=` atom (the DSL has no NOT/IN).
__design_notes__.solo_note: Run in solo mode: the agent issues every call as requestor=assistant; the env routes device tools (run_speed_test, check_network_status, toggle_*, reboot_device, make_payment, can_send_mms, grant_app_permission, ...) to the user toolkit automatically. reward_basis is ENV_ASSERTION for most tasks (judged on final device/account state) and ENV_ASSERTION+ACTION for the two escalation tasks (lock_sim_card_pin, contract_end_suspension) where the required action is transfer_to_human_agents.
__design_notes__.current_date: Per main_policy_solo.md the current time is 2025-02-25 12:08 EST; used by CHECK_SUSPENSION to decide if a line's contract_end_date is in the past.

mobile_data.goal_template: restore mobile data for <customer_name> (<phone_number>) until speed excellent

fields.is_abroad: bool|null (true only if ticket says abroad/traveling)
fields.escalated: bool|null (set once an ESCALATE transfers; halts downstream)
fields.resolved: bool (family goal met; ONLY terminal VERIFY_* / family-exclusive fixes set it)

init_rules: customer_name, phone_number: extract verbatim from the ticket.
is_abroad: true ONLY if the ticket explicitly says the user is abroad/traveling; if it says at home, false; else null.
pay_allowed: true if the ticket says the user authorized paying their overdue bill(s); else null.
refuel_allowed / refuel_gb: 'will refuel 2.0 GB if necessary' -> refuel_allowed=true, refuel_gb=2.0; else null.
ALL diagnostic/phase fields start null and are filled ONLY by their subtask from real tool output. Never fabricate from the ticket.

base_subtask_sequence.name: identifyCustomer
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.customer_id == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: resolveLine
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.customer_id != null and task_state.line_id == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkService
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixAirplane
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.airplane_mode == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixSim
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.sim_status == 'missing'

base_subtask_sequence.name: escalateSim
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.escalated != true and task_state.sim_status == 'locked_pin' or task_state.resolved == false and task_state.escalated != true and task_state.sim_status == 'locked_puk'

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkApn
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status != 'connected' and task_state.service_status != null and task_state.sim_status == 'active' and task_state.apn_broken == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixApn
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.apn_broken == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkSuspension
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status != 'connected' and task_state.service_status != null and task_state.apn_broken == false and task_state.line_suspended == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: escalateContract
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.escalated != true and task_state.line_suspended == true and task_state.contract_ended == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: findBill
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.line_suspended == true and task_state.contract_ended == false and task_state.pay_allowed == true and task_state.overdue_bill_id == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: requestPayment
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.overdue_bill_id != null and task_state.payment_requested != true

base_subtask_sequence.name: makePayment
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.payment_requested == true and task_state.bill_paid != true

base_subtask_sequence.name: resumeLine
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.bill_paid == true and task_state.line_suspended == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: rebootService
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.line_suspended == false and task_state.bill_paid == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: diagnoseData
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkNetworkStatus
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.data_available == false

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixRoamingDevice
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.data_available == false and task_state.is_abroad == true and task_state.roaming_enabled_device == false

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixLineRoaming
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.data_available == false and task_state.is_abroad == true and task_state.roaming_enabled_device == true and task_state.line_roaming_enabled != true

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixMobileData
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.data_available == false and task_state.mobile_data_enabled == false

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkDataUsage
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.data_available == false and task_state.mobile_data_enabled == true and task_state.data_usage_exceeded == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixDataUsage
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.data_available == false and task_state.data_usage_exceeded == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkDataSaver
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.data_saver_on == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixDataSaver
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.data_saver_on == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkNetworkMode
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.network_mode == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixNetworkMode
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.network_mode != '4g_5g_preferred' and task_state.network_mode != null

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkVpn
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.vpn_active == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixVpn
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.vpn_active == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: verifySpeed
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.data_available == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: escalate
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.escalated != true

no_service.goal_template: restore cellular service for <customer_name> (<phone_number>) until connected

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkApn
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status != 'connected' and task_state.service_status != null and task_state.sim_status == 'active' and task_state.apn_broken == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixApn
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.apn_broken == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkSuspension
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status != 'connected' and task_state.service_status != null and task_state.apn_broken == false and task_state.line_suspended == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: escalateContract
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.escalated != true and task_state.line_suspended == true and task_state.contract_ended == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: findBill
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.line_suspended == true and task_state.contract_ended == false and task_state.pay_allowed == true and task_state.overdue_bill_id == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: requestPayment
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.overdue_bill_id != null and task_state.payment_requested != true

base_subtask_sequence.name: makePayment
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.payment_requested == true and task_state.bill_paid != true

base_subtask_sequence.name: resumeLine
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.bill_paid == true and task_state.line_suspended == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: rebootService
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.line_suspended == false and task_state.bill_paid == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: verifyService
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.escalated != true

mms.goal_template: restore MMS for <customer_name> (<phone_number>) until an MMS can be sent

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixApn
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.apn_broken == true

base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.escalated != true and task_state.line_suspended == true and task_state.contract_ended == true

base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.line_suspended == true and task_state.contract_ended == false and task_state.pay_allowed == true and task_state.overdue_bill_id == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: requestPayment
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.overdue_bill_id != null and task_state.payment_requested != true

base_subtask_sequence.name: makePayment
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.payment_requested == true and task_state.bill_paid != true

base_subtask_sequence.name: resumeLine
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.bill_paid == true and task_state.line_suspended == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: rebootService
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.line_suspended == false and task_state.bill_paid == true

base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkNetworkStatus
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.data_available == false

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixRoamingDevice

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixLineRoaming

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixDataUsage
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.data_available == false and task_state.data_usage_exceeded == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkNetworkModeMms
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.network_mode == null

base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.network_mode != '4g_5g_preferred' and task_state.network_mode != null

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkWifiCalling
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.wifi_calling_on == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixWifiCalling
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.wifi_calling_on == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkPerms
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.mms_sms_perm == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixStoragePerm
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.mms_storage_perm == false

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixSmsPerm
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.mms_sms_perm == false

base_subtask_sequence.name: checkApnMms
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.mmsc_url_present == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: fixApnMmsReset
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.mmsc_url_present == false

base_subtask_sequence.name: rebootMms
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.mmsc_url_present == true and task_state.apn_rebooted != true

base_subtask_sequence.name: retestMms
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.speed_test != null and task_state.apn_rebooted == true and task_state.can_send_mms == null

base_subtask_sequence.name: verifyMms
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.service_status == 'connected' and task_state.data_available == true

base_subtask_sequence.name: escalate
base_subtask_sequence.when: task_state.resolved == false and task_state.escalated != true
